use_cases: User login and authentication on SaaS platforms
Secured account access with password visibility toggle
Social authentication via GitHub, Twitter, and LinkedIn
Form input validation with animated floating labels
Interactive form fields with mouse tracking hover effects
ai_summary: A sign-in form component featuring animated floating labels on input fields, password visibility toggle, and social authentication options via GitHub, Twitter, and LinkedIn. The component includes subtle mouse-tracking hover effects on input containers and smooth focus state transitions. Designed for universal authentication use cases across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms.
